hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.sh) ;; *) head -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^#!.*\b(bash|sh)\b' || exit 0 ;; esac; command -v shellcheck >/dev/null || exit 0; out=$(shellcheck "$f" 2>&1) && exit 0; jq -n --arg f "$f" --arg o "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("shellcheck reported issues in \($f):\n\($o)")}}'
